## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project style (ESLint + Prettier pass)
- [ ] `npm run lint` is clean (no new warnings beyond the ratchet)
- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck` passes
- [ ] I added / updated **tests** for my changes
- [ ] I updated **documentation** (`README.md`, `docs/`, JSDoc, etc.) where needed
- [ ] I updated **`CHANGELOG.md`** with a human-readable entry
- [ ] No new secrets, credentials, or PII were committed
- [ ] No new dependencies were added without justification
- [ ] I followed the [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
- [ ] Security-sensitive changes follow [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md)
